title: LA8YB EME MBA
excerpt: Few have seen such a monster antenna as the one of Finn LA8YB. It took this man more than 10 years to build a 32 x 17-ele-Yagi system for 144 MHz in the forests near Oslo. Thereby he created one of the largest amateur radio antenna arrays in the World. With this he can hear his own echoes with only 10 W of RF output power, and he is able to work single yagi stations in CW � easily!
content_html:
Few have seen such a monster antenna as the one of Finn LA8YB. It took this man more than 10 years to build a 32 x 17-ele-Yagi system for 144 MHz in the forests near Oslo. Thereby he created one of the largest amateur radio antenna arrays in the World. With this he can hear his own echoes with only 10 W of RF output power, and he is able to work single yagi stations in CW � easily!

The pictures below give some impression of what I am talking about. The main horizontal mast is carried by two towers that run on a rail. Finn engineered and raised everything himself, being at an age where many other people spend their time worrying about the weather and things. Finn is one of the most outstanding radioamateurs I have met, always helpful and with a clever mind.

The main horizontal mast is carried by two towers that run on a rail. Finn engineered and raised everything himself, being at an age where many other people spend their time worrying about the weather and things. Finn is one of the most outstanding radioamateurs I have met, always helpful and with a clever mind.

Thereby he created one of the largest amateur radio antenna arrays in the World. With this he can hear his own echoes with only 10 W of RF output power, and he is able to work single yagi stations in CW � easily!

sentences.en: Few have seen such a monster antenna as the one of Finn LA8YB.
sentences.zh: 很少有人见过像 Finn LA8YB 这样的巨型天线。

sentences.en: It took this man more than 10 years to build a 32 x 17-ele-Yagi system for 144 MHz in the forests near Oslo.
sentences.zh: 这个人花了 10 多年的时间在奥斯陆附近的森林中建造了一个 144 MHz 的 32 x 17-ele-Yagi 系统。

sentences.en: Thereby he created one of the largest amateur radio antenna arrays in the World.
sentences.zh: 由此，他创建了世界上最大的业余无线电天线阵列之一。

sentences.en: With this he can hear his own echoes with only 10 W of RF output power, and he is able to work single yagi stations in CW � easily!
sentences.zh: 有了这个，他只需 10 W 的射频输出功率就可以听到自己的回声，并且他能够轻松地在 CW 中工作单个八木站！

blocks.html_en: The pictures below give some impression of what I am talking about. The main horizontal mast is carried by two towers that run on a rail. Finn engineered and raised everything himself, being at an age where many other people spend their time worrying about the weather and things. Finn is one of the most outstanding radioamateurs I have met, always helpful and with a clever mind.

sentences.en: The pictures below give some impression of what I am talking about.
sentences.zh: 下面的图片让我对我所说的内容有一些印象。

sentences.en: The main horizontal mast is carried by two towers that run on a rail.
sentences.zh: 主水平桅杆由两个在轨道上运行的塔架承载。

sentences.en: Finn engineered and raised everything himself, being at an age where many other people spend their time worrying about the weather and things.
sentences.zh: 芬恩自己设计和养育了一切，在这个年纪，许多其他人都花时间担心天气和事情。

sentences.en: Finn is one of the most outstanding radioamateurs I have met, always helpful and with a clever mind.
sentences.zh: 芬恩是我见过的最杰出的无线电爱好者之一，他总是乐于助人，头脑聪明。

content_html_zh:
很少有人见过像 Finn LA8YB 这样的巨型天线。 这个人花了 10 多年的时间在奥斯陆附近的森林中建造了一个 144 MHz 的 32 x 17-ele-Yagi 系统。 由此，他创建了世界上最大的业余无线电天线阵列之一。 有了这个，他只需 10 W 的射频输出功率就可以听到自己的回声，并且他能够轻松地在 CW 中工作单个八木站！

下面的图片让我对我所说的内容有一些印象。 主水平桅杆由两个在轨道上运行的塔架承载。 芬恩自己设计和养育了一切，在这个年纪，许多其他人都花时间担心天气和事情。 芬恩是我见过的最杰出的无线电爱好者之一，他总是乐于助人，头脑聪明。
